rationale: The synthetic ensures is `BIG_CONJ ==> det_eq`, so the original ensures conjuncts are NOT free hypotheses — the prior attempt's unconditional asserts of `post1_self_.wf()` etc. failed for exactly this reason. Wrapping the proof in `if BIG_CONJ { ... }` introduces them as hypotheses, after which the cross-side `=~=` equalities on thread/proc/container domains and owned_threads, together with the per-branch Some/None facts, give z3 enough alignment between the two runs to discharge `det_kill_blocked_thread_equal`.
